**A:** A thermostatic mixer maintains constant water temperature regardless of pressure fluctuations, preventing scalding. It's a worthwhile safety and comfort investment, especially for families with children or elderly members.

**Q763:** Do you have bathroom furniture like vanity units?
**A:** Yes, we offer vanity units in various styles, sizes, and finishes. These include wall-hung and floor-standing options with integrated basins or countertop basin compatibility.

**Q764:** Can you recommend water-saving fixtures?
**A:** Yes, all our modern fixtures include water-saving technology. Look for WELS-rated products, aerated tapware, and dual-flush toilets. our premium tapware range's EcoJoy technology reduces water consumption by up to 50% without compromising performance.

**Q765:** Do you sell bath spouts and overflows?
**A:** Yes, we stock bath spouts in various styles — wall-mounted, deck-mounted, freestanding filler spouts — as well as bath overflows and wastes in coordinating finishes.

**Q766:** What basin shapes work best with different bathroom styles?
**A:** Round basins suit soft, organic, and traditional bathrooms. Rectangular and square basins suit contemporary and minimalist spaces. Vessel basins make a statement on any countertop. Our advisors can recommend shapes for your style.

**Q767:** Do you have bathroom fixtures suitable for disabled access?
**A:** Yes, we offer accessible fixtures including raised-height toilets, lever-action mixers, grab rails, walk-in baths, and thermostatic controls. We can specify a complete accessible bathroom package.

**Q768:** Can I return sanware if it doesn't fit my design?
**A:** Uninstalled sanware in original packaging can be returned within 30 days for a refund or exchange. Special-order items cannot be returned unless defective. Check specific terms at the time of purchase.

**Q769:** Do you offer installation services for sanware?
**A:** We don't install directly but can recommend qualified plumbers experienced with our product ranges. Many of our trade partners offer supply-and-install packages for convenience.

**Q770:** What is the difference between rimless and rimmed toilets?
**A:** Rimless toilets have no traditional rim around the bowl, making them significantly more hygienic as there's nowhere for bacteria and limescale to accumulate. They're easier to clean and increasingly the standard for premium bathrooms.

**Q771:** Do you stock outdoor shower fixtures?
**A:** Yes, we offer outdoor shower fixtures in marine-grade stainless steel and brass suitable for pool areas, beach houses, and outdoor bathrooms. These withstand outdoor conditions beautifully.

**Q772:** Can you help me choose between a rain shower and a hand shower?
**A:** Many clients choose both — a rain shower for the luxurious overhead experience and a hand shower for practical washing, cleaning, and accessibility. Our advisors will help you select a combination system that suits your needs.

**Q773:** Do you sell replacement parts for your sanware?
**A:** Yes, replacement parts including cartridges, aerators, hoses, and seals are available for the brands we stock. Contact us with your product details and we can source the correct parts.

**Q774:** What finish is most durable for tapware?
**A:** Chrome remains the most durable and easiest-to-maintain finish. Matte black and brushed brass are also durable but require specific cleaning products. All our finishes are tested for corrosion resistance and longevity.

**Q775:** Do you have smart bathroom fixtures like sensor taps?
**A:** Yes, we offer sensor-activated taps, touchless flush toilets, digital shower systems, and other smart bathroom technologies. These are popular for powder rooms, guest bathrooms, and luxury master suites.

**Q776:** Can I see water flow rates before purchasing tapware?
**A:** Our showrooms have working displays where you can experience water flow rates, spray patterns, and mixer operation before purchasing. This is particularly useful when comparing different brands and models.

**Q777:** Do you offer trade pricing on sanware for designers?
**A:** Yes, registered trade professionals qualify for trade pricing on our full sanware range through the Spec Lab. Account registration is required.

**Q778:** What is the lead time for special-order sanware?
**A:** Special-order sanware typically takes 2-8 weeks depending on the brand and origin. European imports (our premium tapware range) may take 4-8 weeks. We keep popular lines in stock for immediate delivery.

**Q779:** Do you have basin mixers for vessel basins?
**A:** Yes, vessel basins require taller basin mixers or wall-mounted spouts. We stock a range of extended-height mixers specifically designed for use with countertop vessel basins.

**Q780:** Can I get matching sanware for my en-suite and guest bathrooms?
**A:** Absolutely. Using the same sanware collection throughout your home creates cohesion. Many clients use the same range with different basin types or sizes to suit each bathroom's scale.

**Q781:** Do you sell shower drains and floor wastes?
**A:** Yes, we stock tile-in linear drains, centre wastes, and floor drains in various sizes and finishes. These are essential elements of a cohesive wet-area design.

**Q782:** What is the best way to clean chrome and matte black tapware?
**A:** Clean chrome with a soft cloth and mild soap. Matte black requires pH-neutral cleaners — avoid abrasive or acidic products that can damage the finish. Always dry fixtures after cleaning to prevent water spots.

**Q783:** Do you have basins with integrated countertops?
**A:** Yes, we offer integrated basin-and-countertop units in various materials including acrylic, stone composite, and porcelain. These create a seamless, easy-clean vanity surface.

**Q784:** Can you coordinate sanware delivery with my tile delivery?
**A:** Yes, we can coordinate sanware and tile deliveries to arrive together, reducing site visits and ensuring everything is on hand when your plumber and tiler are ready.

**Q785:** Do you offer boiling water taps for kitchens?
**A:** Yes, boiling water taps are available from selected brands. These provide instant boiling water for tea and coffee, eliminating the need for a kettle. Professional installation is required.

**Q786:** What is the difference between a pop-up waste and a click-clack waste?
**A:** A pop-up waste is operated by a lever on the basin mixer. A click-clack waste is operated by pushing the plug. Click-clack is simpler with fewer parts; pop-up offers more control and a cleaner basin appearance.

**Q787:** Do you sell mirrored bathroom cabinets?
**A:** Yes, we offer mirrored cabinets with integrated storage, LED lighting, demister pads, and various mounting options. These complement our vanity and basin ranges for a complete bathroom solution.

**Q788:** Can I get spare toilet seats for your toilets?
**A:** Yes, replacement toilet seats are available for all the toilet models we stock. Soft-close seats are standard on our premium ranges and available as upgrades for most models.

**Q789:** Do you have bathroom fixtures in rose gold?
**A:** Rose gold and copper finishes are available in selected ranges and by special order. These warm metallic finishes are beautiful with-look tiles and contemporary bathroom designs.

**Q790:** What is a concealed cistern and do you stock them?
**A:** A concealed cistern is hidden inside a false wall or furniture unit, with only the flush plate visible. This creates a sleek, modern look and saves space. We stock concealed cisterns from multiple brands.

**Q791:** Do you offer 3D design visualisation of fixtures with tiles?
**A:** Our design advisors can create mood boards and digital layouts showing how your selected fixtures and tiles work together. For full 3D renders, we work with your interior designer's software.

**Q792:** Can I order sanware online?
**A:** While you can browse our sanware range online, we recommend visiting a showroom to see and handle products before purchasing. Our advisors can guide you to the best choices for your specific needs.

**Q793:** Do you have bathroom fixtures suitable for low water pressure?
**A:** Yes, we stock fixtures designed for low-pressure installations. It's important to inform us of your water pressure situation so we can recommend appropriate products that will perform well.

**Q794:** What is the best way to prevent limescale on fixtures?
**A:** Regular cleaning and drying after use prevent limescale buildup. For areas with hard water, consider our premium tapware range's SpeedClean technology which allows easy removal of limescale from spray nozzles. Water softeners are also effective.

**Q795:** Do you offer package pricing for multiple bathroom renovations?
**A:** Yes, clients renovating multiple bathrooms or undertaking whole-home projects receive preferential package pricing on sanware, tiles, and accessories. Your design advisor will create a comprehensive package quotation.

**Q808:** What is the difference between honed and polished stone?
**A:** Honed stone has a matte, satin finish that is more slip-resistant and hides scratches better. Polished stone has a glossy, reflective finish that enhances colour and veining but is more slippery and shows scratches more readily.

**A:** Book-matchedis cut and polished so that adjacent slabs mirror each other, creating symmetrical veining patterns. This technique produces stunning feature walls and statement installations.

**Q816:** What is the difference between tumbled and honed?
**A:** Tumbledhas been processed to create worn, rounded edges and a textured, aged appearance. Honedhas a smooth, flat surface. Tumbled is more rustic and slip-resistant; honed is more refined and contemporary.

**Q822:** Do you offer stone cladding for feature walls?

**Q823:** What is the difference between first and second choice stone?
**A:** First choice stone has consistent colour, minimal fissures, and proper factory filling. Second choice may have more variation, visible fissures, or imperfect filling. We recommend first choice for visible residential applications.

**Q826:** Do you stock pebble mosaics for shower floors?

**Q829:** What is "filled"?
**A:** Filledhas the natural pits and holes filled at the factory with epoxy or cement filler, creating a smoother, more uniform surface. Unfilledhas open holes that can be filled during installation or left open for a rustic look.

**Q830:** Do you offer stone benchtops and vanities?

**Q838:** Can stone tiles be installed over underfloor heating?

**Q841:** Can I get stone tiles with an antique or aged finish?

**Q844:** Can I use stone tiles in a sauna or steam room?

**A:** Small chips can often be repaired with colour-matched epoxy fillers. Larger damage may require professional restoration.is the most chip-resistant stone;and porcelain tile are softer and more susceptible.

**Q852:** What is the difference between honed and leathered?
**A:** Honedhas a smooth, matte finish. Leatheredhas a textured, dimpled surface that feels like leather, hides fingerprints and water spots, and has a unique tactile quality that's popular for countertops.

**Q853:** Do you stock terrazzo tiles?

**Q854:** Can I use outdoor stone tiles around a fire pit?

**Q855:** What is the best way to prevent staining on?

## Category 15: Post-Installation Support

**Q861:** How do I clean my new porcelain floor tiles?
**A:** Sweep or vacuum regularly to remove grit, then mop with warm water and a pH-neutral cleaner. Avoid abrasive scourers, steel wool, and acidic or alkaline cleaners that can damage the glaze over time.

**Q862:** What cleaning products do you recommend for tiles?

**Q863:** How do I maintain grout lines?
**A:** Clean grout lines regularly with a soft brush and grout cleaner. For cement-based grout, apply a grout sealer annually to prevent staining. Epoxy grout is virtually maintenance-free. Avoid harsh scrubbing that can erode grout.

**Q864:** Should I seal the grout in my bathroom?
**A:** Yes, cement-based grout in bathrooms should be sealed with a penetrating grout sealer to prevent mould, mildew, and staining. Epoxy grout doesn't require sealing. Reapply sealer annually or as recommended by the product manufacturer.

**Q865:** How do I remove stains from my tiles?

**Q866:** What should I do if a tile cracks after installation?
**A:** Cracked tiles typically indicate substrate movement or impact damage rather than tile defect. Contact your tiler to assess the cause. Keep spare tiles from your original order for repairs. Structural issues must be addressed before replacement.


**Q868:** Do you offer tile cleaning products for sale?

**Q869:** How do I prevent my bathroom tiles from getting mouldy?
**A:** Ensure adequate ventilation (run the extractor fan during and after showers), clean regularly, seal grout annually, use mould-resistant grout in wet areas, and keep surfaces dry where possible.

**Q870:** What should I avoid using on my tiles?

**Q871:** How do I remove grout haze after installation?

**Q872:** Do tiles need to be resealed over time?

**Q873:** How do I clean my tile splashback in the kitchen?
**A:** Wipe regularly with a damp cloth and mild detergent. For grease and cooking splatters, use a degreasing cleaner. Epoxy grout is particularly low-maintenance in kitchen applications.

**Q874:** What should I do if my grout starts crumbling?
**A:** Crumbling grout indicates either poor initial installation, excessive movement in the substrate, or water ingress behind the tiles. Contact your tiler to assess and repair. Do not simply re-grout without addressing the underlying cause.

**Q875:** How do I remove limescale from my tiles and fixtures?

**Q876:** Do you offer post-installation inspection services?
**A:** While we don't conduct formal post-installation inspections, our technical team can advise on any concerns you have after installation. For independent assessment, we can recommend professional inspectors.

**Q877:** How do I maintain my underfloor heating system?
**A:** Underfloor heating requires minimal maintenance. Have the system serviced annually by a qualified technician, keep thermostats calibrated, and never set temperatures above the manufacturer's maximum (typically 27°C floor temperature).

**Q878:** What should I do if my tiles start lifting?
**A:** Lifting tiles indicate substrate failure, moisture issues, or inadequate adhesive coverage. This is an installation issue that should be addressed by your tiler. Contact them immediately to assess and repair.

**Q879:** How do I clean matte finish tiles?
**A:** Matte tiles hide marks well and clean easily with regular mopping using pH-neutral cleaner. Avoid polish or wax — matte tiles should retain their natural, non-reflective finish.

**Q880:** How do I clean glossy finish tiles?
**A:** Glossy tiles show water spots and streaks more readily. Use a pH-neutral cleaner and dry with a soft cloth or microfibre mop for a streak-free finish. Avoid abrasive cleaners that can dull the gloss over time.

**Q881:** Do you have a care guide for new tile installations?
**A:** Yes, we provide care and maintenance guides with all tile purchases. These cover cleaning recommendations, sealing schedules, do's and don'ts, and troubleshooting common issues.

**Q882:** How do I remove oil stains from my kitchen floor tiles?

**Q883:** What should I do if water gets under my tiles?
**A:** Water under tiles indicates a waterproofing failure or grout breakdown. This is a serious issue that can cause structural damage. Contact your tiler or waterproofing contractor immediately for assessment and repair.

**Q884:** How often should I professionally clean my tiles?

**Q885:** Do you sell replacement tiles from the same batch later?
**A:** We cannot guarantee the same batch will be available later, which is why we recommend purchasing 10-15% extra during your initial order. If you need replacements, we'll match from current stock as closely as possible.

**Q886:** How do I prevent scratches on our laminate flooring tiles?
**A:** Use felt pads under furniture legs, place mats at entrances to trap grit, avoid dragging heavy furniture, and sweep regularly to remove abrasive particles. Porcelain is highly scratch-resistant but not scratch-proof.

**Q887:** What should I do if my epoxy-based grout looks cloudy?
**A:** Epoxy grout haze can be removed with a specialist epoxy-based grout haze remover. Follow the product instructions carefully. Prevention is best — clean epoxy-based grout residue thoroughly during installation.

**Q888:** How do I maintain my outdoor tiles?

**Q889:** Can I use a steam mop on my tiles?

**Q890:** How do I remove rust stains from tiles?

**Q891:** What should I do if my tile grout changes colour?
**A:** Grout can discolour due to mould, staining, or cleaning product residue. Clean with appropriate grout cleaner, reseal if cement-based, or consider professional grout colour sealing for a uniform refresh.


**Q893:** Do you offer any maintenance packages?
**A:** We don't offer maintenance services directly but can recommend professional tile and stone cleaning companies who provide ongoing maintenance packages for residential clients.

**Q894:** How do I protect my tiles during other renovation work?
**A:** Cover tiled floors with breathable protection boards (not plastic sheeting which traps moisture). Use cardboard or felt under ladders and work platforms. Clean up paint, plaster, and adhesive spills immediately.

**Q895:** Can I change my grout colour after installation?
**A:** Yes, grout colour can be changed using grout colourants or epoxy-based grout coatings. This is a cost-effective way to refresh a tiled surface without retiling. Professional application is recommended for best results.

**Q896:** How do I remove paint from tiles after painting?
**A:** Fresh paint can be wiped off with a damp cloth. Dried paint on glazed tiles can often be scraped off gently with a plastic scraper. For stubborn paint, use a paint remover safe for your tile type.

**Q897:** What should I do if my tiles feel slippery when wet?
**A:** If your floor tiles feel too slippery when wet, consider applying an anti-slip treatment that micro-etches the surface to increase grip. This is particularly useful for bathroom floors and outdoor areas.

**Q898:** How do I clean textured tiles effectively?
**A:** Textured tiles trap more dirt in their surface profile. Use a soft brush or microfibre mop with pH-neutral cleaner. A steam cleaner can help lift dirt from textured surfaces. Regular cleaning prevents buildup.

**Q899:** Do you have a customer service line for post-installation questions?
**A:** Yes, our customer service team is available during business hours for post-installation queries. You can also contact your original design advisor who will be familiar with your project.

**Q900:** How do I know if my tiles were installed correctly?
**A:** Signs of good installation: consistent grout joints, no lippage between tiles, solid sound when tapped (no hollow spots), level surface, clean grout lines, proper expansion joints, and waterproofing certificates for wet areas.

**Q901:** What is the best way to dry wet bathroom floors?
**A:** Use a squeegee after showering to remove excess water, run the extractor fan, and keep a window open if possible. Underfloor heating also helps dry floors quickly. Regular drying prevents mould and limescale.

**Q902:** How do I remove silicone sealant that has gone mouldy?
**A:** Cut away the old silicone with a sharp blade, clean the area thoroughly with mould killer, allow to dry completely, and apply new mould-resistant silicone. This should be done every few years as part of bathroom maintenance.

**Q903:** Can I use vinegar to clean my tiles?

**Q904:** How do I deal with efflorescence (white powder) on my tiles?
**A:** Efflorescence is caused by salts migrating through the grout. It can usually be removed with a stiff brush and water. Persistent efflorescence may indicate a moisture problem that needs addressing. Consult your tiler if it recurs.

**Q905:** Do you offer advice on tile restoration for older homes?
**A:** Yes, we can advise on restoring, cleaning, and matching tiles in older homes. We can recommend restoration specialists and help identify period-appropriate replacement tiles where originals are damaged.

**Q906:** How do I maintain the shine on polished porcelain tiles?
**A:** Polished porcelain can be maintained with regular cleaning using pH-neutral products. Avoid wax and polish — they create a slippery film. If the polish dulls over time, professional polishing can restore the shine.

**Q907:** What should I do if I notice mould behind my silicone sealant?
**A:** Mould behind silicone indicates water is getting behind the seal. Remove the old silicone completely, treat the area with mould killer, ensure the area is dry, and reseal with quality mould-resistant silicone.

**Q908:** How do I clean my tile shower without damaging the grout?
**A:** Use a pH-neutral bathroom cleaner and a soft brush. Avoid abrasive cleaners and harsh chemicals. Squeegee after each use. Seal grout annually. For persistent mould, use a hydrogen peroxide-based mould remover.

**Q909:** Can I pressure wash my outdoor tiles?
**A:** Yes, outdoor tiles can be pressure washed, but use a low-to-medium setting and keep the nozzle at least 30cm from the surface. Avoid directing high-pressure water directly at grout joints, which can erode the grout over time.

**Q910:** How do I remove sticker residue from new tiles?
**A:** Sticker residue can be removed with a cloth dampened with mineral turpentine or a commercial adhesive remover. Test on an inconspicuous area first and clean thoroughly afterwards.

**Q911:** What should I do if our laminate flooring tiles sound hollow when tapped?
**A:** A hollow sound indicates that the tile is not fully bonded to the substrate (void beneath). A few hollow-sounding tiles may not be problematic, but widespread hollowness indicates poor installation that should be assessed by your tiler.

**Q912:** How do I maintain my heated tile floors?
**A:** Heated floors require minimal maintenance beyond regular cleaning. Have the heating system serviced annually, keep thermostats calibrated, and avoid setting temperatures above manufacturer recommendations.

**Q913:** Do you recommend professional tile cleaning services?

**Q914:** How do I protect my tiles from my pets?
**A:** Porcelain tiles are highly pet-resistant. Keep claws trimmed, clean accidents promptly, use mats under food and water bowls, and place scratching posts away from tiled areas. Tiles are far more pet-friendly than wood or carpet.

**Q915:** Can I use bleach on my white bathroom tiles?

**Q916:** How do I remove hard water stains from my tiles?

**Q917:** What should I do if my grout cracks?
**A:** Small cracks in grout are often due to natural building movement. Remove the cracked grout and re-grout the joints. If cracking is widespread, contact your tiler — there may be an underlying structural issue.

**Q918:** How do I keep my tile floors looking new for years?
**A:** Regular sweeping, prompt spill cleanup, pH-neutral cleaning, grout maintenance, furniture protection pads, entrance mats, and professional deep cleaning every 1-2 years will keep your floors looking beautiful for decades.

**Q919:** Do you offer replacement tiles if I didn't keep spares?
**A:** We'll do our best to match from current stock, but exact batch matches cannot be guaranteed for older installations. This is why we strongly recommend keeping 2-3 spare boxes from your original order.

**Q920:** How do I deal with squeaky floor tiles?
**A:** Squeaky tiles indicate movement between the tile and substrate. This is typically an installation issue. Contact your tiler to assess — the solution may involve injecting adhesive or, in severe cases, removing and re-laying affected tiles.

**Q921:** Can I apply a gloss enhancer to my matte tiles?
**A:** We don't recommend applying gloss enhancers to matte tiles. They can create an uneven, artificial appearance and may make the floor slippery. Choose the right finish at selection rather than trying to change it later.

**Q922:** How do I clean my tile floors after building work?
**A:** Remove loose debris first, then wash with pH-neutral cleaner. For plaster, paint, or adhesive residue, use appropriate removers for your tile type. Professional post-build cleaning is worthwhile for extensive renovations.

**Q923:** What should I do if I notice staining around my shower drain?
**A:** Staining around drains is common due to soap scum, oils, and limescale accumulation. Clean with an appropriate bathroom cleaner and brush. If the stain persists, the grate may need removing for deep cleaning.

**Q924:** How do I maintain the caulk around my bath and shower?
**A:** Inspect silicone sealant annually. Clean with mould remover if discoloured. Replace every 3-5 years or sooner if mouldy, cracked, or peeling. Proper maintenance prevents water damage behind fixtures.

**Q925:** Do you have a maintenance schedule I can follow?
**A:** Yes, we provide a recommended maintenance schedule with your purchase covering daily, weekly, monthly, and annual tasks for your specific tile type and installation.

**Q926:** Can I use a robot vacuum on my tile floors?
**A:** Yes, robot vacuums work well on tile floors and help maintain them by removing abrasive grit daily. Ensure the vacuum is suitable for hard floors and won't scratch the surface.

**Q927:** How do I remove candle wax from my tiles?
**A:** Let the wax harden, then scrape off gently with a plastic scraper. Remove residue with a cloth dampened with warm water and mild detergent. For coloured wax, a solvent may be needed — test on an inconspicuous area first.

**Q928:** What should I do if my outdoor tiles get algae or moss?
**A:** Clean with a stiff brush and a solution of water and mild detergent. For persistent growth, use an algae remover suitable for your tile type. Improve drainage and increase sunlight exposure where possible to prevent recurrence.

**Q929:** How do I remove ink or marker stains from tiles?

**Q930:** Do you offer any post-installation warranty support?
**A:** Our product warranty covers manufacturing defects. Installation issues are the responsibility of your installer. We're always available to advise, assess concerns, and help resolve issues even after installation is complete.

**Q931:** How do I keep my white grout looking white?
**A:** Seal white grout after installation and reseal annually. Clean regularly with pH-neutral cleaner. For grout that has discoloured, professional grout cleaning or grout colour sealing can restore the white appearance.

**Q932:** What is the best mop for tile floors?
**A:** Microfibre flat mops are excellent for tile floors — they clean effectively, don't excess wet the floor, and are easy to wash and reuse. Avoid string mops that hold too much water and can push dirty water into grout joints.

**Q933:** How do I remove red wine stains from our laminate flooring tiles?

**Q934:** Can I use essential oils to make my tiles smell nice?

**Q935:** How do I deal with a chip in our laminate flooring tile?
**A:** Small chips in porcelain can be filled with colour-matched epoxy filler or a tile repair kit. For larger damage, the tile may need replacement — another reason to keep spare tiles from your original order.

## Category 16: Loyalty & Referral Programs

**Q936:** What is the Collector's Club?
**A:** The Collector's Club is Tiletoria's loyalty programme for discerning clients who appreciate premium design and quality. Members enjoy exclusive benefits including priority consultation booking, early access to new collections, invitations to design events, and special member pricing.

**Q937:** How do I join the Collector's Club?
**A:** You can join the Collector's Club by signing up at any of our showrooms or through our website. Membership is free and open to all renovation clients, interior designers, and trade professionals who value premium tiles and design.

**Q938:** What benefits do Collector's Club members receive?
**A:** Benefits include: priority booking for design consultations, exclusive previews of new collections, invitations to VIP design events and trend evenings, preferential delivery scheduling, member-only promotions, and early notification of sales.

**Q939:** Is there a cost to join the Collector's Club?
**A:** No, Collector's Club membership is complimentary. It's our way of building lasting relationships with clients who share our passion for beautiful spaces and quality materials.

**Q940:** Do you have a referral programme?
**A:** Yes, we have a referral programme that rewards clients who refer friends, family, or colleagues. When your referral makes their first purchase, both you and they receive a benefit — typically a discount voucher or showroom credit.

**Q941:** How does the referral programme work?
**A:** Simply refer someone to Tiletoria and ensure they mention your name when they visit or purchase. Once their qualifying purchase is complete, your referral reward is activated. Contact us for current referral programme terms.

**Q942:** What rewards can I earn through referrals?
**A:** Referral rewards vary but typically include showroom credit vouchers, discounts on future purchases, or upgraded service benefits. The specific reward structure is updated periodically — ask your design advisor for current details.

**Q943:** Is there a limit to how many people I can refer?
**A:** There is no limit to referrals. Many of our loyal clients have introduced multiple friends and family members to Tiletoria, earning rewards on each successful referral.

**Q944:** Do repeat customers get better pricing?
**A:** Collector's Club members and repeat clients enjoy preferential pricing, priority service, and exclusive access to promotions. Your loyalty is recognised and rewarded across all our showrooms.

**Q945:** Do you offer exclusive previews of new collections?
**A:** Yes, Collector's Club members and trade professionals are invited to exclusive preview events where new collections are unveiled before general release. These events often include design presentations, refreshments, and first-purchase opportunities.

**Q946:** Can I bring a guest to Collector's Club events?
**A:** Most Collector's Club events allow members to bring a guest. Specific guest policies are communicated with each event invitation. Design trend evenings are a great opportunity to introduce friends to Tiletoria.

**Q947:** Do you host wine-and-design evenings?
**A:** Yes, we periodically host evening design events at the Spec Lab where members can explore new collections in a relaxed atmosphere with wine and refreshments. These are popular social and design occasions.

**Q948:** Do interior designers get special loyalty benefits?
**A:** Yes, registered interior designers and architects qualify for enhanced trade benefits through our Spec Lab, including trade pricing, extended sample loans, priority access to new collections, and dedicated account management.

**Q949:** What is a "VIP client" at Tiletoria?
**A:** VIP clients are those who have completed significant projects with us or demonstrate ongoing loyalty. VIP status brings enhanced benefits including private after-hours access, personal shopping appointments, and enhanced referral rewards.

**Q950:** Do you offer birthday or anniversary benefits to loyalty members?
**A:** Collector's Club members receive special recognition on their membership anniversary, which may include exclusive offers, invitations to special events, or showroom credits. Details vary annually.

**Q951:** Can loyalty benefits be combined with other promotions?
**A:** Loyalty benefits and promotions are generally combinable, though some exclusions may apply to specific promotional events. Your design advisor will ensure you receive the best available combination of benefits.

**Q952:** Do you have a points-based loyalty system?
**A:** Our Collector's Club focuses on experiential benefits — priority access, exclusive events, and preferential service — rather than a traditional points system. We find this provides more meaningful value to our discerning clientele.

**Q953:** How do I know if I'm eligible for loyalty benefits?
**A:** All clients who make a purchase and register for the Collector's Club are eligible for loyalty benefits. Your design advisor will ensure you're enrolled and inform you of all applicable benefits.

**Q954:** Do loyalty benefits apply across all showrooms?
**A:** Yes, Collector's Club benefits apply at all Tiletoria showrooms nationwide. Your membership is linked to your profile and recognised wherever you shop with us.

**Q955:** Can I transfer my loyalty benefits to someone else?
**A:** Collector's Club benefits are personal and non-transferable. However, referral rewards earned through introducing new clients can be gifted or shared at your discretion.

**Q956:** Do you offer a "friends and family" discount?
**A:** We periodically run friends and family promotions exclusive to Collector's Club members. These events allow members to share their benefits with nominated friends and family for a limited period.

**Q957:** What happens to my loyalty status if I don't purchase for a while?
**A:** Collector's Club membership does not expire due to inactivity. Once you're a member, you remain part of the club. However, some time-sensitive promotions may have purchase windows.

**Q958:** Do you reward clients who provide testimonials or reviews?
**A:** We greatly appreciate client testimonials and reviews. Clients who share their renovation stories, project photographs, or reviews may be recognised with showroom credits or invitations to exclusive events.

**Q959:** Can I earn rewards for social media mentions?
**A:** We love when clients share their Tiletoria renovations on social media. Tag us in your posts and you may be featured on our channels and invited to exclusive events. Contact us for social sharing guidelines.

**Q960:** Do you have a programme for property developers?
**A:** Yes, property developers undertaking multiple renovations or new builds qualify for a dedicated trade account with volume pricing, project coordination, dedicated account management, and priority delivery scheduling.

**Q961:** What benefits do you offer for buy-to-let investors?
**A:** Buy-to-let investors benefit from volume pricing on multiple units, durable product recommendations suited to rental use, efficient project coordination, and repeat-purchase convenience for ongoing portfolio maintenance.

**Q962:** Do you offer seasonal sales or promotions?
**A:** Yes, we run seasonal promotions throughout the year. Collector's Club members receive advance notification and early access to all sales, ensuring first choice of discounted premium products.

**Q963:** Can I get a discount for buying multiple bathrooms at once?
**A:** Yes, multi-bathroom and whole-home projects qualify for volume pricing. The discount structure depends on total project value and product selection. Your design advisor will create a tailored package.

**Q964:** Do you have a newsletter with design tips and promotions?
**A:** Yes, our Collector's Club newsletter features design trends, new collection previews, renovation tips, event invitations, and exclusive member offers. You can subscribe during showroom registration or online.

**Q965:** What is the best way to stay informed about new collections?
**A:** Join the Collector's Club and subscribe to our newsletter. Follow us on social media. And maintain a relationship with your design advisor, who will notify you personally when collections that match your taste arrive.

**Q966:** Do you reward long-term loyalty with additional benefits?
**A:** Yes, our most loyal long-term clients enjoy enhanced benefits including personal shopping appointments, private showroom access, enhanced referral rewards, and first consideration for limited-stock items.

**Q967:** Can my builder or designer earn referral rewards too?
**A:** Yes, trade professionals in our referral network earn rewards for introducing clients to Tiletoria. This is separate from their trade account benefits and provides an additional income stream.

**Q968:** Do you offer group buying discounts for estate developments?
**A:** Yes, estate developments and group renovations qualify for preferential group pricing. We can coordinate bulk orders, scheduled deliveries to multiple units, and consistent product specification across the development.

**Q969:** What exclusive events do Collector's Club members attend?
**A:** Events include new collection launches, design trend evenings, wine-and-design socials, CPD-accredited professional seminars, factory and quarry visits (for trade members), and invitation-only sales previews.

**Q970:** Do you partner with other luxury brands for joint promotions?
**A:** We periodically collaborate with complementary luxury brands — kitchen manufacturers, interior designers, lighting suppliers, and home décor brands — for joint promotions and cross-brand events.

**Q971:** How do I claim my referral reward?
**A:** Contact our customer service team or your design advisor with your referral's name and purchase details. Once verified, your reward will be processed and communicated to you within 14 business days.

**Q972:** Do loyalty members get free delivery?
**A:** Collector's Club members enjoy preferential delivery rates, and free delivery is offered on qualifying orders and during promotional periods. Your design advisor will confirm delivery benefits applicable to your order.

**Q973:** Can I use my loyalty benefits for gift purchases?
**A:** Collector's Club benefits apply to purchases made under your membership. Gift vouchers purchased for others are a great way to share your love of Tiletoria with friends who are renovating.

**Q974:** What is the Spec Lab Professional Programme?
**A:** The Spec Lab Professional Programme is our enhanced trade offering for architects, interior designers, and developers. It includes trade pricing, sample library access, CPD events, technical support, and dedicated account management.

**Q975:** How do I become a Spec Lab trade member?
**A:** Register at our Spec Lab with proof of professional status (SACAP registration, PI insurance, or business registration for developers). Our trade team will set up your account and explain all available benefits.

**Q976:** Do you offer CPD (Continuing Professional Development) events?
**A:** Yes, we host CPD-accredited seminars and workshops for architects and interior designers on topics including tile technology, installation standards, sustainability, and design trends. These events contribute to professional development requirements.

**Q977:** Can I bring a colleague to a Collector's Club event?
**A:** Most events allow a plus-one. Corporate events may allow additional colleagues. Specific guest allowances are detailed in each event invitation. We encourage you to share the Tiletoria experience.

**Q978:** Do you have a corporate hospitality programme?
**A:** For our major corporate clients and top-tier trade partners, we offer a hospitality programme that includes invitations to exclusive events, factory visits to Europe, and hosted design experiences.

**Q979:** What recognition do you give to your most loyal clients?
**A:** Our most loyal clients receive personalised service, invitations to our most exclusive events, early access to limited-stock items, and recognition as valued partners in the Tiletoria community.

**Q980:** Do loyalty benefits apply to sanware purchases too?
**A:** Collector's Club and trade benefits apply across our full product range including sanware, provided the sanware is purchased through Tiletoria. Your advisor will confirm applicable benefits.

**Q981:** How do I update my Collector's Club details?
**A:** Contact any showroom or email our customer service team to update your contact details, preferences, and communication settings. Keeping your details current ensures you receive all relevant communications.

**Q982:** Can I opt out of marketing communications but keep my loyalty benefits?
**A:** Yes, you can manage your communication preferences while retaining your Collector's Club membership and benefits. Contact us to adjust your preferences at any time.

**Q983:** Do you have a mobile app for loyalty members?
**A:** We don't currently have a mobile app. Collector's Club communications are delivered via email, SMS, and personal contact from your design advisor. Our website is mobile-optimised for browsing collections.

**Q984:** What happens to my loyalty account if I move cities?
**A:** Your Collector's Club membership is valid nationwide. If you move to another city, simply visit your new local Tiletoria showroom and they'll access your existing profile and benefits.

**Q985:** Do you offer a welcome gift for new Collector's Club members?
**A:** New Collector's Club members receive a welcome pack including membership details, a showroom guide, design inspiration materials, and information about upcoming events and available benefits.

**Q986:** Can I combine referral rewards with volume discounts?
**A:** Referral rewards and volume discounts can typically be combined for maximum benefit. Your design advisor will structure your purchase to ensure you receive all applicable benefits.

**Q987:** Do you celebrate milestone purchases with clients?
**A:** Yes, we recognise clients who reach significant purchase milestones with enhanced benefits, personal acknowledgements, and invitations to our most exclusive events.

**Q988:** How do I refer an interior designer to your trade programme?
**A:** Simply introduce them to our Spec Lab team or provide them with our trade registration details. When they register and begin purchasing, you'll earn your referral reward.

**Q989:** Do Collector's Club members get extended return periods?
**A:** Standard return policies apply to all purchases. However, members may receive enhanced flexibility in specific circumstances at the discretion of showroom management.

**Q990:** What is the most valuable loyalty benefit you offer?
**A:** Our most valued benefit is the relationship with a dedicated design advisor who understands your style, preferences, and project history — providing personalised service that improves with every interaction.

**Q991:** Do you offer a concierge service for VIP clients?
**A:** For our most valued clients and substantial projects, we offer a concierge-level service including personal shopping appointments, home visits, priority scheduling, and dedicated point-of-contact throughout your project.

**Q992:** Can loyalty members request specific products to be imported?
**A:** Collector's Club members and trade clients can request special imports from our international supplier network. We'll assess feasibility, provide lead times and pricing, and arrange the import if viable.

**Q993:** Do you have partnerships with interior design schools?
**A:** We maintain relationships with leading interior design schools, offering student tours, material library access, and educational support. Design students are the future of our industry and we invest in their development.

**Q994:** How do you recognise architects who specify Tiletoria regularly?
**A:** Regular-specifying architects enjoy enhanced trade benefits, invitations to exclusive professional events, recognition in our project showcases, and dedicated technical and specification support.

**Q995:** Do you offer sample packs as loyalty rewards?
**A:** Curated sample packs, design books, and trend guides are sometimes offered as Collector's Club rewards or event takeaways. These are valued by design-conscious clients and professionals alike.

**Q996:** Can I donate my referral reward to charity?
**A:** We're happy to discuss directing referral rewards to a nominated charity. Contact our customer service team to arrange this — we appreciate clients who want to share their good fortune.

**Q997:** Do you have an alumni programme for past clients?
**A:** All past clients remain part of the Tiletoria community through the Collector's Club. We maintain relationships, offer ongoing support, and welcome you back for future projects with enhanced recognition.

**Q998:** What is the Tiletoria Ambassador Programme?
**A:** Our Ambassador Programme recognises clients who actively promote Tiletoria through referrals, testimonials, social sharing, and event participation. Ambassadors enjoy the highest tier of benefits and recognition.

**Q999:** How can I become a Tiletoria Ambassador?
**A:** Ambassadors are invited based on their engagement, loyalty, and enthusiasm for the brand. Consistent referrals, active social sharing, and participation in our community are the pathways to Ambassador status.

**Q1000:** Why should I remain loyal to Tiletoria for future renovations?
**A:** Ongoing loyalty brings deepening benefits: your design advisor knows your preferences, you receive priority access to new collections, pricing improves with volume, and the relationship ensures every renovation is smoother and more enjoyable than the last.




---

# Persona 3: Smaller Contractors — Q&A Knowledge Base

> **Persona:** Owner-operator tiling contractor, 2-5 permanent staff + casuals, KZN/Gauteng/WC, 2-15 units/month, 50-300m² jobs, sole decision-maker. Top concerns: stock-outs, pricing consistency, credit access, and speed.

---

## Category 1: Trade Account Setup & Management (60 Q&As)

**Q1:** How do I open a trade account with Tiletoria?
**A:** Visit any Tiletoria trade counter with your company registration documents, ID, proof of address, and latest 3 months' bank statements. Complete the trade account application form at the counter or request one via WhatsApp. Most accounts are processed within 48-72 hours.

**Q2:** What documents do I need to apply for a trade account?
**A:** You'll need your CIPC company registration certificate or business name registration, your ID document, proof of residential address (utility bill not older than 3 months), latest 3 months' business bank statements, and a completed credit application form. If you're VAT registered, include your VAT certificate.

**Q3:** How long does trade account approval take?
**A:** Standard trade account approval takes 48-72 hours from the time all documents are submitted. If additional credit checks are required, it may extend to 5 business days. You'll receive an SMS and WhatsApp confirmation once approved.

**Q4:** Can I start buying before my trade account is fully approved?
**A:** Yes, you can make cash purchases immediately at any trade counter while your application is being processed. Keep your receipts — once your trade account is active, those purchases can be retrospectively linked to your account for volume tracking.

**Q5:** What's the difference between a cash trade account and a credit trade account?
**A:** A cash trade account gives you access to trade pricing (15-25% below retail) but requires payment at the time of purchase or collection. A credit trade account extends 30-day payment terms subject to credit approval and a set limit.

**Q6:** What credit limit can I expect as a new smaller contractor?
**A:** Initial credit limits for smaller contractors typically range from R15,000 to R50,000 depending on your turnover, credit history, and time in business. Limits are reviewed every 6 months and can be increased based on payment history and volume.

**Q7:** How do I increase my credit limit?
**A:** Contact your dedicated account manager or the trade counter supervisor. You'll need to provide updated bank statements showing increased turnover and demonstrate 3+ months of consistent payment within terms. Limit increase requests are processed within 3-5 business days.

**Q8:** Can I get 60-day or 90-day payment terms instead of 30 days?
**A:** Standard terms are 30 days. Extended terms of 60 days may be considered for established contractors with 12+ months of consistent payment history and monthly purchases exceeding R50,000. Apply through your account manager with supporting financials.

**Q9:** Do you offer credit to contractors who are blacklisted or have poor credit?
**A:** Each application is assessed individually. If you have credit challenges, you may still qualify for a cash trade account with full trade pricing benefits. Credit accounts require a satisfactory credit check, but we work with contractors to find a suitable arrangement.

**Q10:** Can I have trade accounts at multiple Tiletoria branches?
**A:** Yes, your trade account is valid across all Tiletoria branches — Cape Town (Paarden Eiland), Johannesburg (Northriding) and Menlyn (Spec Lab), Cornubia, and Paarden Eiland. You can collect from or request delivery from any branch.

**Q11:** Is there a minimum monthly spend to maintain a trade account?
**A:** There is no strict minimum monthly spend for cash trade accounts. For credit accounts, we expect some activity every 90 days. If your account is dormant for 6 months, it may be reviewed for deactivation, but you can reactivate at any time.

**Q12:** I'm a one-man tiler with no registered company — can I still get trade pricing?
**A:** While formal trade accounts require business registration, informal tilers can access competitive pricing at the trade counter. We encourage you to formalise your business to unlock full trade benefits, credit facilities, and volume rebates.

**Q13:** My business is registered in my wife's name — can I apply for the trade account?
**A:** Yes, provided you have a letter of authority from the registered owner authorising you to transact on behalf of the business, along with both parties' ID documents. Alternatively, the registered owner can apply and designate you as the authorised purchaser.

**Q14:** Do I need to renew my trade account annually?
**A:** Trade accounts are reviewed annually. You'll be asked to submit updated CIPC documents, proof of address, and recent bank statements. Your account manager will contact you when renewal is due — usually a straightforward process if your business details haven't changed.

**Q15:** Can I add additional authorised buyers to my trade account?
**A:** Yes, you can add up to 3 authorised buyers (e.g., your site foreman, wife/partner, or delivery coordinator). Submit their full names, ID numbers, and contact details in writing to your account manager or at the trade counter.

**Q16:** What happens if I exceed my credit limit mid-project?
**A:** Contact your account manager immediately. For active projects, we can often arrange a temporary limit increase or release reserved stock against a partial payment. We understand that project timelines don't always align with statement cycles.

**Q17:** Can I get a trade account if I'm based in PE but work mostly in East London?
**A:** Yes, your PE trade account gives you access to trade pricing nationwide. For East London projects, you can arrange delivery through the Paarden Eiland (delivery charges apply) or collect from PE and transport yourself.

**Q18:** How do I know if my credit account application has been approved?
**A:** You'll receive an SMS confirmation and a WhatsApp message from your branch with your account number and credit limit. Your account manager will also call to introduce themselves and explain how to use your account.

**Q19:** Can I use my Tiletoria trade account at Spec Lab?
**A:** Yes, your Tiletoria trade account is valid at Spec Lab Menlyn (Menlyn). The same pricing, terms, and credit limits apply. Spec Lab offers additional specifier-grade products and services for higher-end residential projects.

**Q20:** What is the interest rate on overdue credit account balances?
**A:** Interest is charged at 2% per month (24% per annum) on overdue balances. To avoid interest, ensure payment reaches us by the 30th day from statement date. If you're experiencing cash flow issues, contact your account manager before the due date.

**Q21:** Do you require personal surety for credit accounts?
**A:** For credit limits up to R50,000, personal surety is generally not required for registered companies with 2+ years' trading history. For higher limits or newer businesses, the directors may be asked to sign personal surety.

**Q22:** Can I get a pro forma invoice to secure a job before opening a trade account?
**A:** Yes, any branch can provide a pro forma invoice at trade pricing to help you secure a tender or quote. Once your account is approved, the pro forma can be converted to a formal order.

**Q23:** How do I close or suspend my trade account?
**A:** Submit a written request to your account manager. All outstanding balances must be settled, and any unused credits will be refunded. Accounts can be suspended (e.g., for seasonal breaks) and reactivated later without reapplying.

**Q24:** Do you offer a trial period for new trade account holders?
**A:** New trade accounts start on cash terms for the first month, after which credit terms are activated (if approved). This allows both parties to establish a trading relationship before credit is extended.

**Q25:** What's the difference between a trade account and a normal retail purchase?
**A:** Trade accounts offer 15-25% below retail pricing, access to dedicated trade counters, 30-day credit terms (if approved), dedicated account managers, WhatsApp stock checking, delivery prioritisation, and volume rebate eligibility. Retail purchases are at marked prices with immediate payment.

**Q26:** Can I change my trading name on my account?
**A:** Yes, submit your updated CIPC registration documents and a letter requesting the name change. The update takes 2-3 business days. Your account number and credit limit remain unchanged.

**Q27:** I'm a subcontractor — can my main builder pay Tiletoria directly on my behalf?
**A:** Yes, third-party payments are accepted provided your account is in good standing. The builder must reference your Tiletoria account number when making payment. Notify your account manager in advance of any third-party payments.

**Q28:** Do you keep my account information confidential?
**A:** Absolutely. All account and personal information is handled in accordance with POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act). Your information is never shared with third parties without your consent.

**Q29:** Can I get a consolidated statement if I buy from multiple branches?
**A:** Yes, request a consolidated statement from your account manager. Statements can be emailed monthly or accessed on request. Each transaction shows the branch of purchase for easy tracking.

**Q30:** What happens if my business banking details change?
**A:** Notify your account manager immediately and provide a new bank confirmation letter or updated bank statement. This ensures your account details remain current and prevents payment reconciliation delays.

**Q31:** Do I need NHBRC registration to open a trade account?
**A:** No, NHBRC registration is not required to open a trade account. However, having NHBRC registration may strengthen your credit application and is recommended if you enrol houses for warranty.

**Q32:** Can a CC (Close Corporation) still open a trade account?
**A:** Yes, existing CCs can still open trade accounts. You'll need your CK1/CK2 documents and a resolution from the members authorising the account. Note that CIPC no longer registers new CCs.

**Q33:** I'm a plumber — can I open a trade account even though I also do tiling?
**A:** Yes, multi-trade contractors are welcome. Your trade account gives you access to our full range including tiles, adhesives, sanware, and waterproofing. Your account manager can recommend cross-category bundles.

**Q34:** Do you offer joint accounts for business partnerships?
**A:** Yes, partnership applications require all partners' IDs, the partnership agreement, and a resolution signed by all partners specifying authorised signatories. Each partner's credit profile is assessed for credit accounts.

**Q35:** How do I update my contact details on my trade account?
**A:** WhatsApp your updated cell number, email, or address to your account manager, or email the changes to accounts@tiletoria.co.za. Updates are processed within 24 hours.

**Q36:** Can I set a purchase limit for my authorised buyers?
**A:** Yes, you can set individual purchase limits for each authorised buyer. This is useful for controlling site foreman or delivery coordinator purchases. Contact your account manager to set these limits.

**Q37:** What happens to my trade account if I sell my business?
**A:** Trade accounts are not transferable. The new owner must apply for their own account. Any outstanding balance remains the responsibility of the original account holder until settled.

**Q38:** Do you offer credit insurance or payment protection?
**A:** We don't offer credit insurance directly, but we recommend contractors consider business credit insurance to protect against client non-payment, which can affect your ability to pay suppliers.

**Q39:** Can I get a letter of good standing from Tiletoria?
**A:** Yes, request a letter of good standing from your account manager. This confirms your account is active and in good order. Useful for tender applications and builder relationships.

**Q40:** What is the fastest way to open a trade account?
**A:** The fastest way is to visit your nearest trade counter with all documents ready (ID, CIPC docs, 3 months bank statements, proof of address). Complete the application on-site, and approval typically takes 48-72 hours.

**Q41:** Can I apply for a trade account online?
**A:** Initial applications can be started by requesting a form via WhatsApp or email, but you'll need to visit a trade counter in person to submit documents and sign the application. Online-only applications are being developed.

**Q42:** Do I get a trade card or account number?
**A:** You'll receive a unique trade account number. Present this number or your ID at the trade counter for quick service. Some branches issue trade cards — ask at your local counter.

**Q43:** What is the age requirement for a trade account?
**A:** The business must be registered, and the applicant/director must be 18 years or older. There is no maximum age limit.

**Q44:** Can I get trade pricing on sanware and adhesives too?
**A:** Yes, your trade account gives you access to trade pricing across all categories — tiles, adhesives, grouts, waterproofing, sanware, flooring, and accessories. Volume discounts apply across the total basket.

**Q45:** Do you verify my home address or business address?
**A:** We verify both. Proof of residential address (utility bill) is required for credit checks, and your business address is used for deliveries and correspondence.

**Q46:** Can I use my accountant or bookkeeper as the point of contact?
**A:** You can designate an additional contact person (e.g., your bookkeeper) to receive statements and pricing, but the account holder remains the primary responsible party for payments.

**Q47:** What credit bureau do you use for checks?
**A:** We use major credit bureaus including TransUnion and Experian. A credit check is only conducted with your consent as part of the application process.

**Q48:** Can I get a credit account without a credit check?
**A:** No, credit checks are mandatory for credit accounts as part of responsible lending practices. Cash trade accounts don't require credit checks.

**Q49:** How do I dispute something on my account statement?
**A:** Contact your account manager or the accounts department within 7 days of statement issue. Provide details of the disputed transaction, and we'll investigate and respond within 5 business days.

**Q50:** Do you offer introductory pricing for new trade account holders?
**A:** New trade account holders receive our standard trade pricing immediately. Additional welcome promotions are run periodically — ask your account manager about current new-account incentives.

**Q51:** Can I get a temporary credit limit increase for a big project?
**A:** Yes, contact your account manager with details of the project, expected value, and duration. Temporary increases are assessed case-by-case and may require a deposit or partial prepayment.

**Q52:** What happens if my client doesn't pay me — can I get an extension?
**A:** Contact your account manager before your due date to discuss payment arrangements. We understand contractor cash flow challenges and can often arrange a short extension or payment plan for trusted accounts.

**Q53:** Do you offer account statements via WhatsApp?
**A:** Yes, you can request your current balance and recent transactions via WhatsApp. Full PDF statements are emailed monthly or on request.

**Q54:** Can I set up automatic payments from my bank?
**A:** Yes, set up a debit order or scheduled EFT from your bank using your Tiletoria account number as reference. Notify us if you set up a debit order so we can note it on your account.

**Q55:** Is there a joining fee for trade accounts?
**A:** No, there is no joining fee or annual membership fee for trade accounts. You only pay for the products you purchase.

**Q56:** Can my trade account be used for personal/residential purchases?
**A:** Trade accounts are for business use. However, many contractors use their trade account for their own homes — just ensure this doesn't conflict with your business tax position. We don't restrict personal use.

**Q57:** Do you offer training or onboarding for new trade account holders?
**A:** Yes, your account manager will walk you through the product range, ordering process, WhatsApp stock checks, and delivery options. Branch open days and product demonstrations are also held regularly.

**Q58:** Can I get references from other contractors who use Tiletoria?
**A:** We can connect you with contractors in our network at networking events and braai days. Due to privacy, we don't share contact details directly, but our contractor community is active and supportive.

**Q59:** What makes a trade account application get rejected?
**A:** Common reasons include incomplete documentation, unsatisfactory credit check, business not registered, or inconsistent banking history. If rejected, we'll explain why and guide you on reapplying.

**Q60:** How do I reactivate a dormant trade account?
**A:** Contact your nearest branch or account manager. Dormant accounts can usually be reactivated within 24 hours with updated contact details. Credit limits may need to be reassessed if dormant for over 12 months.

---

## Category 2: Trade Pricing & Margins (60 Q&As)

**Q1:** How much discount do I get with a trade account?
**A:** Trade account holders receive 15-25% below retail pricing, depending on the product category. Tile categories typically see the deepest discounts, while specialty items like premium sanware may have smaller margins.

**Q2:** Is trade pricing the same across all branches?
**A:** Yes, trade pricing is standardised across all Tiletoria branches. You won't get different prices in Durban vs Cape Town vs Johannesburg for the same SKU.

**Q3:** How does volume pricing work?
**A:** Volume pricing kicks in at project level. Projects requiring 500m²+ of tile typically qualify for additional discounts beyond standard trade pricing. Speak to your account manager for a project-specific price.

**Q4:** Do I get better pricing if I buy more than one product category?
**A:** Yes, bundled purchases (e.g., tiles + adhesive + grout + waterproofing) can attract additional margin. Your account manager can structure a package deal for full-project material supply.

**Q5:** How long are quotes valid for?
**A:** Standard trade quotes are valid for 14 days. Project quotes for 500m²+ are valid for 30 days. If pricing changes during the quote period, we'll honour the quoted price on stock already in the country.

**Q6:** Can I get a formal quote for a tender?
**A:** Yes, we provide formal trade quotes on letterhead with full product descriptions and specifications suitable for tender submission. Allow 24-48 hours for formal tender quotes.

**Q7:** Do your prices include VAT?
**A:** All displayed prices and quotes exclude VAT unless stated otherwise. VAT at 15% is added at checkout or invoicing.

**Q8:** How often do prices change?
**A:** Prices are reviewed quarterly based on exchange rates, container costs, and supplier pricing. Major price adjustments are communicated 14 days in advance via WhatsApp and email to all trade account holders.

**Q9:** Can I lock in a price for a future project?
**A:** For confirmed projects with a purchase order, we can lock pricing for up to 30 days. For large projects (1000m²+), extended price holds of 60-90 days may be negotiated with a deposit.

**Q10:** Do I get notified before prices go up?
**A:** Yes, all trade account holders receive advance notification of price increases via WhatsApp broadcast and email. Typically 14 days' notice is given, allowing you to place forward orders at current pricing.

**Q11:** Is there a price difference between cash and credit trade purchases?
**A:** No, trade pricing is the same whether you pay cash or use your credit facility. Early payment discounts may apply to credit accounts — check with your account manager.

**Q12:** Can I get a price list to keep in my bakkie?
**A:** Yes, request a current trade price list from your account manager or at the trade counter. Price lists are also available via WhatsApp as a PDF. Top 200 fast-moving SKUs are included.

**Q13:** Do you price match competitors like competitor retailers Trade or competitor retailers Pro?
**A:** We regularly benchmark our pricing against the market. If you have a genuine lower written quote for an identical product, bring it to your account manager. We'll do our best to match or better it.

**Q14:** How do I know I'm getting the right trade price at the counter?
**A:** Always quote your trade account number before the transaction is processed. The trade price will automatically pull up on the system. If in doubt, ask the counter staff to confirm your trade discount percentage.

**Q15:** Are there hidden charges on trade accounts?
**A:** No hidden charges. You pay the quoted product price plus VAT. Delivery, if requested, is charged separately. Credit accounts incur interest only if payment exceeds 30-day terms.

**Q16:** Can I get a breakdown of pricing for a full bathroom installation?
**A:** Yes, your account manager can provide a full material list with pricing for tiles, adhesive, grout, waterproofing, trims, spacers, and sanware. Bring your plans or dimensions for accurate quantities.

**Q17:** Do trade prices apply to special orders and imported products?
**A:** Yes, trade pricing applies to our full range including special-order imported products. Lead times and minimum order quantities may apply for non-stock items.

**Q18:** What is the typical markup I should add for my clients?
**A:** Most smaller contractors mark up materials by 15-25% when billing clients. This covers your time sourcing, handling, warranty risk, and cash flow. Your Tiletoria trade pricing is designed to support this margin structure.

**Q19:** Can I get project pricing for a 15-unit complex I'm tiling?
**A:** Absolutely. Bring your BOQ or material schedule to your account manager. Project pricing for multi-unit developments offers enhanced discounts beyond standard trade, especially for 1000m²+ total volumes.

**Q20:** Do you offer early settlement discounts on credit accounts?
**A:** Yes, a 2.5% early settlement discount applies to credit account balances settled within 7 days of statement date. This is automatically calculated on your statement.

**Q21:** Can I get a provisional price for budgeting purposes?
**A:** Yes, request a budgetary estimate from the trade counter or your account manager. These are non-binding but use current trade pricing to help you prepare client quotes. Formal quotes can be issued when specifications are confirmed.

**Q22:** Do prices differ between the trade counter and the showroom?
**A:** Showroom retail prices are higher than trade counter prices. Always purchase through the trade counter or quote your account number to ensure you receive trade pricing.

**Q23:** How does the exchange rate affect pricing?
**A:** Most of our imported products are priced in Euros or US Dollars. When the Rand weakens significantly, price increases may be necessary. We hedge currency exposure where possible to provide pricing stability.

**Q24:** Can I get a price commitment for a 6-month project?
**A:** For large projects with confirmed schedules, we can structure a supply agreement with fixed pricing for up to 6 months. A deposit or monthly minimum commitment is typically required.

**Q25:** Do you offer clearance or end-of-line pricing to trade?
**A:** Yes, clearance stock is offered to trade account holders first, often at 30-50% below trade price. Clearance notifications are sent via WhatsApp broadcast. Act fast — clearance stock moves quickly.

**Q26:** Can I see my purchase history and average pricing?
**A:** Yes, your account manager can provide a purchase history report showing products, quantities, and average pricing over any period. This helps you track costs and plan future projects.

**Q27:** Is there a minimum order value for trade pricing?
**A:** No minimum order value for standard trade pricing. For project pricing and volume discounts, minimum volumes (typically 500m² for tiles) apply.

**Q28:** Do you offer retrospective volume rebates?
**A:** Yes, quarterly volume rebates are calculated based on total purchases across all categories. Thresholds and rebate percentages are communicated at the start of each quarter.

**Q29:** How do I get the best possible pricing from Tiletoria?
**A:** Maximise your discount by: buying across multiple categories, consolidating purchases to hit volume tiers, paying early for the settlement discount, attending trade days for special pricing, and building a relationship with your account manager.

**Q30:** Do trade prices include delivery?
**A:** No, delivery is charged separately based on distance and load size. However, large orders (R20,000+) within 30km may qualify for free delivery — ask your account manager.

**Q31:** Can I get a quote in Excel format for my records?
**A:** Yes, request an Excel quote from your account manager. This is useful for importing into your own quoting system or BOQ.

**Q32:** What is the price difference between porcelain and ceramic tiles for trade?
**A:** At trade, ceramic wall tiles start from around R80-120/m², while porcelain floor tiles range from R150-400/m² depending on size and origin. Your trade discount applies to both categories.

**Q33:** Do adhesive and grout prices fluctuate like tile prices?
**A:** Adhesive and grout prices are more stable as they're locally manufactured. Price adjustments typically happen annually rather than quarterly. Stock up during promotional periods.

**Q34:** Can I get a price estimate without my trade account number?
**A:** Informal estimates can be given at the counter, but trade pricing is only confirmed when your account number is verified. Open a trade account to lock in the best prices.

**Q35:** How do I compare Tiletoria pricing with what I'm currently paying?
**A:** Bring your recent invoices from your current supplier (with prices visible) to your account manager. We'll do a line-by-line comparison on comparable products.

**Q36:** Are there additional discounts for NHBRC-registered contractors?
**A:** NHBRC registration doesn't attract a separate discount, but registered contractors often qualify for higher credit limits and are prioritised for project pricing.

**Q37:** Do you offer package pricing for bathroom sets?
**A:** Yes, bathroom set packages (tiles + sanware + fittings + accessories) are available at bundled pricing. Ask your account manager for current bathroom package deals.

**Q38:** Can I get trade pricing on samples?
**A:** Sample pieces are generally provided free to trade account holders for client presentations. Full-size paid samples are available at trade price if you need to leave with a client.

**Q39:** How do I request a price match?
**A:** Provide your account manager with a written quote from a competitor for the exact same product (brand, size, colour, batch). The quote must be current (within 14 days). We'll verify and match where possible.

**Q40:** Do prices go down when the Rand strengthens?
**A:** We review pricing quarterly in both directions. Sustained Rand strengthening may lead to price reductions on imported products, which we pass on to trade customers.

**Q41:** Can I get pricing for a client who wants a specific Italian tile?
**A:** Yes, we import from Italy, Spain, France, Turkey, Brazil, India, and China. If we don't stock the specific tile, we can source it or recommend the closest equivalent from our range.

**Q42:** Is there a difference between trade counter pricing and phone/email pricing?
**A:** No, pricing is consistent across all channels. However, the trade counter may offer clearance items or on-the-day specials that aren't advertised elsewhere.

**Q43:** Can I get a discount on my first order?
**A:** New trade account holders sometimes qualify for a first-order promotional discount. Ask your account manager about current new-customer incentives.

**Q44:** How do quantity breaks work on adhesives and grouts?
**A:** Adhesive and grout pricing typically has breaks at 20 bags, 50 bags, and 100+ bags. Your trade price already includes the base discount, and volume tiers apply on top for large projects.

**Q45:** Do you offer trade pricing to labour-only contractors?
**A:** Labour-only contractors who don't purchase materials can still open a cash trade account for sundries (spacers, trims, tools) at trade pricing. For material procurement, we work with your client's account or direct payment.

**Q46:** Can I get an all-in price per square metre for tiling a bathroom?
**A:** Your account manager can provide an all-in material price per m² including tiles, adhesive, grout, and waterproofing. Labour is excluded as you provide your own installation service.

**Q47:** How does Spec Lab pricing compare to trade counter pricing?
**A:** Spec Lab carries premium and designer ranges with higher base prices, but trade discounts still apply. For mid-market residential work, the trade counter typically offers better value.

**Q48:** Can I get a fuel levy or transport cost breakdown?
**A:** Delivery charges are quoted as a single rate based on distance and load size. If you need a detailed breakdown for a tender, your account manager can provide one.

**Q49:** Are your trade prices published anywhere?
**A:** Trade prices are confidential to account holders and not published publicly. Your price list is provided on account opening and updated regularly.

**Q50:** Can I negotiate pricing for a very large project?
**A:** For projects exceeding R500,000 in materials, pricing is negotiable at management level. Contact your account manager to escalate to the branch manager for project-specific pricing.

**Q51:** Do you offer price protection on forward orders?
**A:** Yes, if you place a forward order and pay a deposit, the quoted price is protected even if exchange rate changes lead to price increases before delivery.

**Q52:** How do I know if a product is on promotion?
**A:** Trade promotions are announced via WhatsApp broadcast and in-branch signage. Your account manager also flags relevant promotions based on your purchase history.

**Q53:** Can I get pricing for underfloor heating systems?
**A:** Yes, we supply and price underfloor heating systems at trade rates. Systems start from approximately R450-650/m² depending on the system type and coverage area.

**Q54:** Do you offer different pricing tiers for different contractor sizes?
**A:** All trade account holders receive the same base trade discount. Volume tiers and project pricing are based on purchase volume rather than business size, so smaller contractors buying in volume get the same rates as larger ones.

**Q55:** What is the typical price range for 600x600mm porcelain tiles at trade?
**A:** 600x600mm porcelain floor tiles at trade typically range from R120-280/m² for standard ranges, and R280-450/m² for premium imported ranges.

**Q56:** How much should I budget for adhesive per square metre?
**A:** At trade pricing, quality tile adhesive costs approximately R25-45/m² depending on tile size and adhesive type. Large-format tiles require premium adhesive at the higher end.

**Q57:** Do you offer trade pricing on tools and tiling equipment?
**A:** Yes, tile cutters, trowels, spacers, leveling systems, and other tools are available at trade pricing. Full tool lists are available at the trade counter.

**Q58:** Can I get a cost-per-square-metre breakdown for different tile sizes?
**A:** Your account manager can provide a comparative cost breakdown showing material cost per m² for different tile sizes (e.g., 600x600 vs 800x800 vs 1200x600) including adhesive and grout.

**Q59:** How do I factor Tiletoria pricing into my client quotes?
**A:** Use your trade price as the base cost, add your markup (typically 15-25%), add delivery if applicable, and present the total to your client. Your account manager can help you structure professional client quotes.

**Q60:** Who do I speak to if I think I've been overcharged?
**A:** Return to the trade counter with your receipt or invoice, or contact your account manager immediately. We'll review the transaction and process a refund or credit note if an error occurred.

---

## Category 3: Stock Availability & Checking (60 Q&As)

**Q1:** How do I check if a product is in stock before I drive to the branch?
**A:** The fastest way is to WhatsApp your branch with the product code or description. Responses are typically within minutes during trade counter hours. You can also call the trade counter directly.

**Q2:** What's the WhatsApp number for stock checks?
**A:** Each branch has its own WhatsApp number for stock checks. Your account manager will share the number when your account is opened. Save it in your phone for quick access.

**Q3:** How accurate is the WhatsApp stock check?
**A:** WhatsApp stock checks reflect the live system and are accurate at the time of checking. However, stock moves quickly during trade hours, so we recommend confirming availability before leaving the site and reserving if needed.

**Q4:** Can I reserve stock while I arrange a bakkie or transport?
**A:** Yes, trade account holders can reserve stock for up to 24 hours (48 hours by arrangement) with no deposit. After that, the reservation is released unless extended.

**Q5:** What happens if I reserve stock and don't collect it?
**A:** Unclaimed reservations are automatically released after 24 hours (48 hours by arrangement). Frequent no-shows may affect your reservation privileges. If you're running late, a quick WhatsApp call extends the hold.

**Q6:** Do you guarantee stock availability for my confirmed projects?
**A:** For confirmed projects with a purchase order or deposit, we guarantee stock availability for the agreed delivery schedule. Walk-in purchases are subject to available stock.

**Q7:** What are the "top 50 contractor SKUs" and why do they matter?
**A:** These are the 50 fastest-moving tile SKUs purchased by contractors — typically neutral colours in 600x600 and 800x800 porcelain, white wall tiles, and standard grey floor tiles. We guarantee these are always in stock.

**Q8:** How do I find out which products are in the top 50?
